description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on push and pull request events to branches master and dev. The workflow has two jobs: test-cov-py which runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs tox, runs tox, and uploads coverage to Coveralls; and coveralls-py which runs conditionally on the repository and base reference, depends on test-cov-py, and finishes the coverage upload to Coveralls.
